description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a combination of white, light gray, and red-orange hues with mint green accents. The upper is constructed from a mix of synthetic leather and mesh, providing both durability and breathability. The midsole is thick and sculpted, with a visible cutout and a translucent mint green section, likely for cushioning and support. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue, with a pull tab at the heel and another at the tongue for easy wearing. Subtle branding details are present, including a small logo on the heel and a faint emblem on the tongue. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments and active use.
description: A stylish, modern athletic sneaker in white, gray, and red-orange with mint green accents, featuring a sculpted midsole and padded collar. The shoe combines synthetic leather and mesh for durability and comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sculpted midsole with a mint green cutout, red-orange mesh panel, and visible branding on the heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white laces, padded tongue with a faint emblem, and streamlined toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the red-orange mesh panel, mint green midsole accent, and clean lines of the upper.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded heel collar, black pull tab with cross-stitch detail, and red-orange heel tab.
attribute_logo: Embossed Jumpman logo on the tongue in white, small circular logo on the heel tab in red-orange
